overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic city waterfront district. The player moves from a street crossing down to a canal promenade, passing palm trees, towering skyscrapers, and industrial structures under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with elevated transit

events.description: crossing the street toward the waterfront canal

agents.ego_description: walking across a futuristic city street toward a waterfront canal, passing traffic lights and palm trees

entered.detail: elevated transit rail running horizontally across the scene
tall glass tower with orange 05 signage near the top
tall palm tree lining the street
vertical traffic signal pole with crosswalk lights
white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright, sunlit futuristic city street. The camera moves forward across a crosswalk, passing a traffic light pole while approaching a waterfront. Elevated monorail tracks span the view, with a distinctive glass skyscraper marked with '05' rising in the distance.

events.description: moving from street level down to waterfront promenade
turning to face the water and industrial structures across the canal

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge, observing the industrial architecture and canal water reflections

entered.detail: tall cylindrical industrial structure with metallic finish across the canal
calm water surface reflecting the surrounding buildings
vertical concrete retaining wall along the water edge
horizontal metal pipes forming a safety barrier along the water

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the waterfront promenade, revealing a wide canal with industrial architecture on the opposite bank. The camera moves along the concrete embankment, passing metal railings while the water reflects the towering cylindrical industrial structure across the canal.

events.description: ascending concrete stairs along the waterfront

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs along the waterfront, looking up at palm trees and surrounding towers, then descending back to the promenade

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with horizontal treads leading upward
bright yellow metal railing along the stair edge

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete stairway along the waterfront, shifting the perspective upward toward palm trees and the sky. After reaching the top, it descends back to the water level, revealing the industrial district from a slightly elevated angle before returning to the promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with commercial vending

events.description: entering shaded promenade area with commercial vending machines
flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered waterfront path, passing vending machines and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: flying car passing overhead from left to right
pedestrian walking ahead on the path carrying a brown bag

entered.detail: row of colorful automated vending machines including purple and yellow units

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a shaded waterfront promenade lined with colorful vending machines on the left. The camera passes other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction while a flying vehicle cruises overhead. The industrial cylinder tower remains visible across the canal as the walk continues along the metal-railed water edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit city street crossing down to a shaded waterfront promenade lined with industrial architecture. It begins by moving across a crosswalk under elevated monorail tracks, heading toward a distant glass skyscraper marked with 05. As the camera reaches the waterfront, the scene opens onto a wide canal where the water reflects a towering cylindrical industrial structure on the opposite bank. The perspective then shifts upward as the camera ascends and descends a wide concrete stairway, momentarily elevating the view of the industrial district and palm trees before returning to the promenade level. Finally, the movement continues along a shaded walkway past colorful vending machines and pedestrians, while a flying vehicle cruises overhead against the backdrop of the distant industrial tower.
